testName: FBLA Project Management National Competitive Exam 2025-2026

questions.question: What is the primary definition of a project in the context of project management?
options: A recurring operational process
A temporary endeavor to create a unique product or service
The daily management of company assets
A software application used for scheduling
questions.correctAnswer: A temporary endeavor to create a unique product or service
questions.Help: Projects are distinct from ongoing business operations because they have a defined beginning and end.

questions.question: Which of the following best describes the ethical responsibility of a project manager?
options: Prioritizing the budget over project quality at all times
Ensuring transparency and honesty in reporting status to stakeholders
Keeping sensitive project risks hidden to avoid panic
Favoring internal team members over external contractors
questions.correctAnswer: Ensuring transparency and honesty in reporting status to stakeholders
questions.Help: Ethical project management relies on integrity and transparent communication.

questions.question: What is the primary role of a project manager?
options: To perform all technical tasks individually
To delegate all authority to the sponsor
To plan, execute, and monitor the project to achieve defined goals
To focus exclusively on marketing the project results
questions.correctAnswer: To plan, execute, and monitor the project to achieve defined goals
questions.Help: The project manager serves as the lead integrator for scope, time, and resources.

questions.question: Which document is created to define the total scope of work to be performed by the project team?
options: Work Breakdown Structure (WBS)
Risk Assessment Matrix
Communication Log
Budget Forecast Report
questions.Help: The WBS breaks down the project scope into manageable chunks.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of identifying stakeholder expectations during the initiation phase?
options: To eliminate the need for project changes
To ensure project objectives align with key influencer needs
To reduce the total number of project team members
To assign financial liability to the stakeholders
questions.correctAnswer: To ensure project objectives align with key influencer needs
questions.Help: Understanding stakeholders early prevents misalignment during later project stages.

questions.question: Which tool is best suited for identifying potential project risks before they occur?
options: Gantt Chart
Risk Management Plan
Resource Allocation Table
Scope Creep Analysis
questions.Help: Risk planning involves identifying, analyzing, and developing response strategies.

questions.question: When monitoring project progress, what is the primary purpose of taking corrective action?
options: To increase the project budget
To realign actual performance with the project plan
To replace team members who are underperforming
To shorten the project timeline indefinitely
questions.correctAnswer: To realign actual performance with the project plan
questions.Help: Corrective action closes the gap between the plan and reality.

questions.question: How should a project manager best coordinate efforts between cross-functional teams?
options: By setting independent deadlines for each department
By establishing clear communication channels and shared goals
By requiring all teams to report to the CEO directly
By limiting team interaction to avoid conflict
questions.correctAnswer: By establishing clear communication channels and shared goals
questions.Help: Cross-functional teams require high-level integration and synchronized objectives.

questions.question: Why is it important to document 'lessons learned' at the end of a project?
options: To justify the project costs to auditors
To provide a reference for improving future project performance
To penalize team members for past mistakes
To fulfill contractual obligations with external vendors
questions.correctAnswer: To provide a reference for improving future project performance
questions.Help: Lessons learned capture historical knowledge to avoid repeating errors.

questions.question: What is the final step in closing a project?
options: Archiving project documents and releasing resources
Starting the next project immediately
Deleting all digital communication logs
Publishing a public press release
questions.correctAnswer: Archiving project documents and releasing resources
questions.Help: Closing involves formal sign-off and releasing team members to other work.
